response.justification: Bogdan has a genuinely strong technical foundation spanning 20 years with relevant experience in developer tooling (CI/CD setup, test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators), and his workshops and open-source contributions demonstrate knowledge-sharing instincts. However, the role is fundamentally a people management position requiring at least 2 years of direct team leadership, and the resume contains zero evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, setting team roadmaps, or any other people-management responsibility. Staff-level IC titles at Altom and re:cinq do not substitute for the management track record the JD requires as a minimum, making this a misaligned application for the current level.
strengths: Long breadth of developer tooling experience: CI infrastructure, test automation frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and MCP/agentic developer tooling at re:cinq.
Active knowledge-sharing culture: organized Refactoring Dojos, Code Katas, created multi-day Selenium and Web Internals workshops — signals coaching mindset.
Polyglot, full-stack depth across 20 years covering web, mobile (iOS/Apple TV), embedded, and systems programming with proven delivery across many tech stacks.
concerns: No people management experience whatsoever — no mention of direct reports, hiring, performance feedback, or 1:1s across the entire career history.
No evidence of technical roadmap ownership, cross-team alignment, or setting organizational priorities at any scope.
The most recent role (re:cinq, April 2025–present) is just two months old, suggesting instability or an active career transition that adds uncertainty about commitment.

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
No roadmap or org leadership evidence
